cases.judge_reason: The response explicitly states 'You have 30 days from the delivery date to start a return', which satisfies the criteria.
cases.response: You have 30 days from the delivery date to start a return [policy-returns-return-window]. Just keep in mind that items need to be unworn and unused with original tags attached and original packaging included—anything showing wear, wash, or outdoor use can't be accepted [policy-returns-return-window].

cases.judge_reason: The agent's response explicitly states that the refund will go to the original payment method within 5 to 7 business days after the return is received and inspected, fully satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: Once we receive and inspect your return, your refund will go to your original payment method within 5 to 7 business days [policy-returns-refunds]. You'll get a confirmation email when the refund is issued.

cases.judge_reason: The agent response explicitly states the $7.50 USD return shipping fee deducted from the refund, and states that this fee is waived entirely for items that arrived damaged, defective, or not as ordered (incorrect items). Both elements of the criteria are satisfied.
cases.response: Yes, there is a return shipping fee. When you use our prepaid label, we deduct a flat 7.50 USD fee from your refund [policy-returns-return-shipping-cost]. However, the fee is waived entirely if your item arrived damaged, defective, or not as ordered [policy-returns-return-shipping-cost].

cases.judge_reason: The agent explicitly states that spending at least 75 USD qualifies for free standard shipping, matching the criteria.
cases.response: You need to spend at least 75 USD to get free standard shipping [policy-shipping-domestic-shipping-options]. If your order is under that amount, standard shipping is 6.95 USD. We also offer expedited and overnight options if you need your gear faster.

cases.judge_reason: The agent's response states that expedited shipping costs 14.95 USD and arrives in 2 business days, matching the criteria exactly.
cases.response: Expedited shipping is 14.95 USD and arrives in 2 business days [policy-shipping-domestic-shipping-options].

cases.judge_reason: The agent states shipping does not currently extend to India, clarifies international shipping is limited to Canada, and does not promise India shipping. This satisfies the criteria (domestic US shipping is implied as standard and not contradicted).
cases.response: We don't currently ship to India. [policy-shipping-international-shipping] We only ship internationally to Canada at this time. If you have questions about future shipping options, I'd recommend reaching out to support@auroraoutfitters.com.

cases.judge_reason: The response states there is a 1-year warranty against manufacturing defects from date of delivery, and explicitly notes normal wear and tear (along with misuse and accident damage) is not covered, satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: Yes, Aurora Outfitters brand gear comes with a 1-year warranty against manufacturing defects from the date of delivery [policy-returns-warranty]. This covers defects in materials or workmanship, but normal wear and tear, misuse, and accident damage are not covered. If you have a defective item, you can submit photos for a warranty claim and we'll replace it or refund you.

cases.judge_reason: The response explains the price adjustment policy: within 14 days of order date, refunded to original payment method, and clarifies it's a one-time adjustment per order, matching the criteria.
cases.response: Yes, you can! If the jacket dropped in price within 14 days of your order date, we'll refund the difference to your original payment method [policy-faq-price-adjustments]. The refund is a one-time adjustment per order, and it doesn't apply if the item is marked as FINAL SALE or if the price change is between different sale events [policy-faq-price-adjustments].

cases.judge_reason: The agent explicitly states 'No, gift cards never expire', satisfying the criterion.
cases.response: No, gift cards never expire [policy-faq-gift-cards]. They also carry no fees and can be used across multiple orders whenever you're ready.

cases.judge_reason: The response provides the support email (support@auroraoutfitters.com) and states the hours as Monday through Friday, 8 am to 5 pm Mountain Time, satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: You can reach our support team by emailing support@auroraoutfitters.com [policy-faq-contacting-support]. We're available Monday through Friday, 8 am to 5 pm Mountain Time, and we answer every message within 1 business day [policy-faq-contacting-support]. If you include your order number in your email, you'll get the fastest help [policy-faq-contacting-support].

cases.judge_reason: The agent correctly recommends the Stormline Rain Jacket and describes it as waterproof, and the details it gives (2.5-layer shell, taped seams, pit zips) match the catalog. However, it omits the 'packable' feature that the criteria explicitly requires to be mentioned, so the response does not fully satisfy all criteria.
cases.response: Yes, we have the Stormline Rain Jacket [stormline-rain-jacket], which is a 2.5-layer waterproof breathable shell perfect for hiking. It's rated 10,000 mm / 10,000 g with fully taped seams and an adjustable storm hood, plus pit zips to dump heat on the climb. It's priced at 179.99 USD and we have sizes S through XL in stock.
The Stormline Rain Jacket is $179.99 [stormline-rain-jacket]. We have it in stock in sizes S through XL if you'd like to order one.

cases.judge_reason: The agent explicitly confirms the Stormline Rain Jacket is available in medium and states there are 13 in stock, satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: Yes, the Stormline Rain Jacket is available in medium [stormline-rain-jacket]. We have 13 in stock right now, and it's priced at $179.99.

cases.judge_reason: The response clearly states the snowboard is currently out of stock, mentions the waitlist option, and does not claim it can be purchased right now.
cases.response: The Out of Stock Snowboard is currently out of stock [the-out-of-stock-snowboard]. However, you can join the waitlist since restocks sell through fast, and you'll be notified when it becomes available again.

cases.judge_reason: The agent recommends the Summit Ridge 2-Person Tent with a citation tag and provides plausible catalog-consistent details (setup time, doors/vestibules, weight, price, colors/stock). Without a real catalog to cross-check, the response format and content align with the criteria of recommending this specific tent with supporting details.
cases.response: The Summit Ridge 2-Person Tent is a great choice for two people [summit-ridge-2-person-tent]. It's a freestanding three-season tent that sets up in under ten minutes, and the two doors with separate vestibules mean you won't have to climb over your tent mate in the middle of the night. It weighs just 2.1 kg, so it's easy to split between two backpackers, and it's priced at 289.99 USD. We have it in stock in both Forest Green and Burnt Orange.

cases.judge_reason: The response mentions the Ember 750 Sleeping Bag and states its 15 F comfort limit, satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: We carry the Ember 750 Sleeping Bag [ember-750-sleeping-bag], which is a 750-fill down mummy bag with a 15 F comfort limit. It's designed for backpacking and weighs just 860 grams, so it's great if you're looking for something lightweight and warm. It comes in both Regular and Long sizes, and we have both in stock right now.

cases.judge_reason: The agent recommends the Glacier Point Down Parka and includes the specified details: 700-fill down insulation and comfort rating to about -15 C, matching the catalog information required by the criteria.
cases.response:
The Glacier Point Down Parka is your best bet for serious winter warmth [glacier-point-down-parka]. It's filled with 700-fill down and has an insulated hood, so it'll keep you comfortable around camp down to about -15 C when you layer it with other gear. It's priced at 329.99 USD and we have sizes M, L, and XL in stock.

If you're looking for something lighter that you could layer under a shell jacket instead, the Stormline Rain Jacket [stormline-rain-jacket] is a waterproof option at 179.99 USD, but the down parka is really the dedicated winter piece.

Yes, we do sell trekking poles! The Ridgeline Trekking Poles [ridgeline-trekking-poles] weigh 245 g per pole and come as a pair for $89.95. They feature telescoping aluminum construction with flick locks, natural cork grips, and carbide tips that grip rock and ice well. We currently have 19 pairs in stock.

cases.judge_reason: The response confirms gift cards can be purchased and are digital/delivered by email, but it fails to mention the denomination range of $10 to $100 USD as required by the criteria.
cases.response: Yes, you can buy a gift card for your brother! [policy-faq-gift-cards] Gift cards are digital and delivered by email, usually within minutes of purchase. They never expire, carry no fees, and can be used across multiple orders. It's a great way to let him choose exactly what he needs from Aurora Outfitters.
